items.title: Fixed AI summary usage counter
items.description: Usage now increments correctly when using AI summary multiple times
details: Fixed issue where usage counter stayed at 1 instead of incrementing
Added Regenerate button to generate new summaries (each counts toward usage)
Regenerate button appears inline with the usage tracker on note detail page
Simple-usage page now refreshes with latest data when you pull to refresh

items.title: Fixed payment checkout errors
items.description: Improved handling of Stripe customer issues
details: Fixed "No such customer" errors when signing up for subscription
Automatically recovers when stored customer ID is invalid (e.g. test/live mismatch)
Creates new customer and continues checkout seamlessly

items.title: Cleaner production experience
items.description: Reduced console noise in production
details: Console messages are now hidden in production web builds
Development experience unchanged - full logging when developing

items.title: Patched React2Shell vulnerability
items.description: Updated React and dependencies to secure versions
details: Fixed critical remote code execution vulnerability (CVE-2025-55182)
Updated React from 19.1.0 to 19.2.3 with security patches
Updated react-dom to match React version for compatibility
Updated expo-router to latest version with patched dependencies
Prevents unauthenticated remote code execution attacks
CVSS Score: 10.0 (Critical) - Immediate patching applied

items.title: Security improvements
items.description: Enhanced application security posture
details: Removed vulnerable code from dependency tree
Updated all transitive dependencies to secure versions
Future-proofed against potential RSC feature usage
Maintains full backward compatibility with existing code

items.title: Faster Note Loading
items.description: Implemented smart data loading for users with many notes
details: Significantly reduced initial load times
Implemented pagination for seamless scrolling through large note libraries
Optimized data fetching to use less data

items.title: Smoother Experience
items.description: Optimized app performance for better responsiveness
details: Smoother scrolling in note lists on mobile devices
Reduced memory usage to prevent crashes
Faster app startup time with optimized initialization
Fixed freezing issues during heavy operations

items.title: Improved Reliability
items.description: Enhanced error handling and crash prevention
details: Integrated advanced crash reporting system
Fixed PDF upload issues on mobile devices
Resolved random crashes during app startup
Better handling of network connection issues

items.title: Fixed Bulk User Management
items.description: Admins can now properly view and manage user profiles
details: Resolved access permission issue for admin accounts
Fixed ability to view all user profiles in the dashboard
Fixed "User object missing id field" error in Support Dashboard
Improved reliability of bulk actions

items.title: Fixed Netlify functions API key error
items.description: Monthly usage reset now works correctly
details: Added support for both new sb_secret_ keys and legacy JWT-based keys
Functions now prioritize new secret keys over legacy keys
Improved error messages for missing environment variables
Admin dashboard monthly usage reset feature now functional

items.title: Note sharing translations
items.description: Share feature now fully translated for English and Spanish
details: All share-related UI elements, labels, and messages now translatable
Success and error messages properly localized
Search results and user selection messages translated
Public link creation and sharing flows fully translated
Both web and mobile share interfaces support multiple languages

items.title: Fixed button cut-off on home screen
items.description: Notas Recientes buttons no longer get cut off on smaller screens
details: Buttons now properly wrap when needed
Responsive design improvements for all screen sizes
Better spacing and layout on mobile devices
Buttons display fully without being cut off at screen edges

items.title: Fixed premium status loading
items.description: Premium status now displays correctly from the start
details: No more incorrect 'inactive' state flash on page reload
Premium status loads immediately from user profile
Better loading states and visual feedback
Improved user experience with consistent status display

items.title: Delete button on note details page
items.description: Delete notes directly from the note details screen
details: Added delete button next to edit and archive buttons (both mobile and web)
Includes confirmation dialog to prevent accidental deletions
Respects permissions for shared notes
Styled with danger color for clear visual indication
Both platforms supported for consistent experience

items.title: Role creation restriction
items.description: Roles now only created during account signup
details: Fixed roles being created during sign-in, OAuth flows, and session restoration
Prevents unauthorized role assignment outside of the signup process
Proper role assignment based on email domain during account creation
Improved security by limiting role creation to legitimate account signup only
Enhanced role preservation logic to prevent overwriting manually assigned roles

items.title: Fixed editing rich text notes
items.description: Rich text notes can now be properly edited and saved
details: Fixed content HTML preservation during note editing
Improved rich text editor state management
Proper content format handling between edit and view modes
Enhanced save functionality for rich text content

items.title: Edit button color update
items.description: Changed edit button to distinctive blue color
details: Edit button now uses blue (#007AFF) for better visibility
Makes the primary edit action more prominent
Consistent across both mobile and web platforms
Professional appearance with better button contrast

items.title: Fixed note page theme
items.description: Note details page now properly respects theme settings
details: All text, backgrounds, and UI elements adapt to light/dark mode correctly
Buttons and action items use theme-aware colors
Consistent theming across all note detail components
Improved readability in both light and dark themes

items.title: Fixed back button on edit screen
items.description: Edit screen navigation now works properly
details: Back button properly disabled during save operations to prevent data loss
Confirmation dialog appears when attempting to discard unsaved changes
Improved navigation flow between edit and detail screens
Better handling of unsaved changes detection

items.title: Expandable content sections
items.description: Long note content and summaries now have "See more" buttons
details: Note content shows significantly more text before requiring expansion (3000 chars for rich text, 1500 for plain text)
Summary section now truncates at 800 characters with expand option
Both sections support expand/collapse functionality
Enhanced spacing and line height for better readability
Applied to both mobile and web platforms

items.title: Increased content preview area
items.description: Note content now gets more space on mobile
details: Rich text preview increased from 2000 to 3000 characters
Plain text preview increased from 500 to 1500 characters
Max height increased from 400px to 800px for better content visibility
Minimum height set to 400px for comfortable reading
Improved line height (24px) and padding for better text readability

items.title: Markdown-style rich text formatting
items.description: Create beautifully formatted notes with markdown syntax
details: Headers: Use # H1, ## H2, ### H3 for headings
Bold text: Wrap with **text** for bold formatting
Italic text: Wrap with *text* for italic formatting
Underline: Wrap with __text__ for underlined text
Lists: Use - item or • item for bullet lists
Numbered lists: Use 1. item for ordered lists
Inline code: Wrap with `code` for code snippets
Links: Use [text](url) for clickable links
Intentional spacing: Add blank lines for visual separation

items.title: Rich text viewer
items.description: View notes with proper HTML rendering
details: Automatic conversion from markdown to HTML
Theme-aware text colors (adapts to light/dark mode)
Clean spacing with zero margins on headings
Proper line breaks and paragraph formatting
Professional typography with system fonts

items.title: Fixed AudioPlayer excessive logging
items.description: Audio player no longer spams console with status updates when idle
details: Modified status polling to only run when audio is actively playing
Added automatic polling stop when audio is paused or stopped
Restart polling only when user clicks play button
Eliminated repeated 'Updating isPlaying state' and 'Updating duration' log messages
Improved performance by reducing unnecessary background processing
Better resource management with conditional polling logic

items.title: Fixed excessive spacing in notes
items.description: Notes now display with clean, minimal spacing
details: Eliminated unwanted gaps between headings and text
Removed default margins from H1, H2, H3 headings
Fixed line break spacing to be consistent and minimal
Zero margins on paragraph elements for tight layout
Proper spacing between consecutive headings

items.title: Fixed text wrapping issues
items.description: Text now properly wraps and displays
details: Removed paragraph wrapping that added extra space

Changed line break conversion from
to proper paragraphs
Clean visual hierarchy with proper heading spacing
Consistent text rendering across all notes

items.title: Fixed text color in dark theme
items.description: Text now properly inherits theme colors
details: Rich text automatically adapts to light/dark mode
Heading colors match theme settings
Proper color inheritance for all text elements
JavaScript-based color enforcement for reliability

items.title: Better markdown to HTML conversion
items.description: Improved HTML generation for better formatting
details:
Wraps plain text lines in paragraphs instead of using
tags
Adds spacer elements for intentional blank lines
Maintains clean semantic HTML structure
Proper content formatting without excessive spacing

items.title: Enhanced rich text CSS
items.description: Comprehensive styling for rich text elements
details: Zero margins on all headings for tight layout
Compact paragraph spacing for readability
Proper list styling with bullet points and numbering
Code block styling with syntax highlighting background
Blockquote styling with left border accent
Professional table styling with hover effects
Theme-aware colors for all elements

items.title: Fixed mobile subscription payment failures
items.description: Mobile payments now work reliably across all environments
details: Fixed TEST vs LIVE Stripe mode configuration mismatch
Mobile app now correctly uses environment-specific Stripe backend
Eliminated "No such setupintent" errors during payment flow
Added proper Stripe price ID synchronization between mobile and backend
Environment-aware configuration for development and production

items.title: Fixed Stripe price ID mismatches
items.description: Subscription creation now works without price lookup errors
details: Resolved "No such price" errors when subscribing to premium plans
Added proper handling of TEST and LIVE mode price IDs
Database plans now correctly reference environment-specific Stripe prices
Updated plan sync system to validate price IDs against correct Stripe mode
Added debugging tools for Stripe configuration verification

items.title: Enhanced native payment form
items.description: Better reliability and error handling
details: Added stripePriceId parameter support to PaymentSheetForm
Improved payment confirmation flow with better error messages
Enhanced debug logging for payment troubleshooting
Better environment configuration visibility (DEV/PROD mode logging)
Fixed payment intent handling to support both SetupIntent and PaymentIntent

items.title: Improved API configuration system
items.description: Better environment handling
details: Enhanced ApiConfig to support multiple deployment environments
Added environment-specific webhook URL configuration
Better separation between TEST and LIVE mode settings
Improved configuration debugging and validation tools

items.title: Enhanced Stripe mode detection
items.description: Automatic environment detection
details: Better handling of TEST vs LIVE Stripe keys
Improved price ID validation across different modes
Added configuration checks for mobile payment setup
Enhanced error messages for configuration issues
Better logging of Stripe environment state

items.title: Added comprehensive debugging scripts
items.description: 9 new tools for easier troubleshooting
details: check-api-config.js - Verify API endpoint configuration
check-live-prices.js - Check LIVE mode Stripe prices
check-stripe-prices.js - Validate Stripe price IDs
debug-mobile-config.js - Debug mobile app configuration
debug-stripe-keys.js - Verify Stripe key setup
test-payment-endpoint.js - Test payment endpoint connectivity
test-payment-flow.js - End-to-end payment flow testing
test-sync-endpoint.js - Validate subscription sync
verify-stripe-price.js - Verify price ID exists in Stripe

items.title: Created detailed troubleshooting guides
items.description: Easy reference for common issues
details: MOBILE_APP_CONFIG_FIX.md - Guide for mobile app configuration issues
STRIPE_PRICE_MISMATCH_FIX.md - Step-by-step guide for price ID issues
Comprehensive explanation of TEST vs LIVE mode differences
Quick fix commands for common configuration problems
Environment setup best practices

sections.title: Note Sharing - Now a Core Feature

items.title: Removed note sharing feature flag
items.description: Note sharing is now a core feature available to all users
details: Eliminated artificial limitations on note sharing functionality
Removed usage limits (previously 5 shares/month for free users)
Note sharing is now unlimited for all users regardless of subscription
Simplified feature management by removing flag dependencies
Updated all related services, limits, and admin tools

items.title: Added comprehensive error boundaries
items.description: App no longer crashes on errors
details: Created robust ErrorBoundary component with graceful error handling
Wrapped main app layouts (web and native) with error protection
Users see friendly "Try Again" screen instead of crashes
Debug information available in development mode
Automatic error recovery and retry mechanisms

items.title: Fixed app crash on kill/restart
items.description: App now handles killed state gracefully
details: Improved session restoration with timeout protection (20s timeout)
Added race condition prevention for app state transitions
Enhanced mobile app state handling with better delays (1-2s)
Safe session restoration that won't crash the app
Graceful fallback to minimal profiles when database queries timeout

items.title: Enhanced crash recovery mechanisms
items.description: Automatic recovery from edge cases
details: Added 18-second crash recovery timeout in useAuth hook
Session restoration coordination to prevent premature navigation
Better loading states with "Restoring your session..." message
Extended timeouts to allow proper session restoration
Prevents navigation before session restoration completes

items.title: Improved session restoration robustness
items.description: Better handling of slow networks
details: Reduced profile verification timeout from 3s to 2s for faster failure detection
Added minimal profile creation as fallback when database queries timeout
Better error handling throughout session restoration process
Non-blocking initialization prevents app startup delays
Silent timeout handling without showing errors to users

items.title: Enhanced app state handling
items.description: Better background/foreground transitions
details: Prevented multiple simultaneous restoration attempts
Added individual timeouts for each session attempt (5s per attempt)
Improved validation of current user sessions
Better cleanup of stale user data on errors
Network resilience for slow connections

items.title: Fixed note sharing URLs
items.description: Now uses correct domain instead of placeholder
details: Changed from 'your-app-url.com/shared/' to 'wiznote.app/shared/'
Updated PaymentForm fallback URLs to use actual domain
Fixed support ticket URLs in database triggers
Added environment variable support for easy configuration
Consistent domain usage across all sharing features

items.title: Fixed session restoration timeout errors
items.description: No more "Session restoration timeout" errors
details: Graceful handling of timeout errors without showing to users
Better logging with appropriate log levels (warn vs error)
Automatic retry mechanisms for failed restorations
Fallback strategies when session restoration fails

items.title: Fixed race condition in navigation
items.description: App no longer navigates before session restoration
details: Added session restoration completion tracking
Navigation only happens after restoration is complete
Prevents users from being sent to login screen when they have valid sessions
Better coordination between auth state and navigation logic

items.title: Fixed app state transition crashes
items.description: Better handling of killed/restart scenarios
details: Improved AppState change handling with proper delays
Better error handling in mobile app state transitions
Prevented crashes when app is killed and restarted
Enhanced session validation on app activation

items.title: Fixed keyboard blocking share sheet on mobile
items.description: Share sheet now properly avoids keyboard
details: Upgraded to @gorhom/bottom-sheet v5 for professional bottom sheet implementation
Share sheet now smoothly moves up when keyboard appears
Interactive keyboard behavior with keyboardBehavior="interactive"
Users can now access all share options without keyboard obstruction

items.title: Upgraded create note bottom sheet
items.description: Create note options now use professional bottom sheet
details: Dynamic snap points that adjust based on available options
Swipe-down to close gesture for better UX
Backdrop tap-to-close functionality
Consistent bottom sheet experience across all modals

items.title: Fixed mobile quiz header padding
items.description: Quiz screens now have proper status bar spacing
details: Updated quiz header padding: 20px → 48px
Prevents close/back buttons from being hidden by status bar

items.title: Fixed shared note loading
items.description: Shared notes now load properly without freezing
details: Removed blocking condition that waited for user's notes to load first
Added proper authentication state check with authLoading flag
Unauthenticated users now get proper login prompt
Authenticated users can now successfully access shared notes

items.title: Protected viewers from AI usage counting
items.description: Viewing shared notes doesn't drain AI quota
details: AI summaries won't auto-generate when viewing shared notes
Manual AI generation blocked for shared notes
Only displays existing AI features generated by note owner

items.title: Fixed account deletion modal
items.description: Delete account modal now properly displays password fields
details: Removed blocking test element that was covering form content
Fixed ScrollView configuration for accessibility
Updated modal height for optimal user experience

items.title: Fixed email verification
items.description: Email verification links now work properly
details: Added missing auth/callback route registration
Users can complete email verification without errors

items.title: Added Terms of Service links
items.description: Users can now easily access terms and privacy policy
details: Added links to login and signup screens
Both links properly styled and functional on all platforms
